name: Chicken Satay
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the boneless chicken into 1/2-inch strips.
2. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients for the marinade: soy sauce, minced garlic, sherry or vermouth, onion, sugar, ginger, brown sugar, additional soy sauce, more garlic, catsup, and lime juice.
3. Stir in well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Place the chicken strips into the marinade and mix thoroughly to ensure even coating.
5. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight to allow the flavors to develop.
6. Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers.
7. Microwave the assembled skewers on high for 6 minutes, turning halfway through the cooking time.
8. Prepare the peanut sauce by melting the crunchy peanut butter in a microwave-safe bowl with water until smooth.
9. Stir in the remaining ingredients and cook gently until heated through.
10. Serve the chicken skewers with the hot peanut sauce drizzled over them.
11. This recipe serves 4 as main dishes or 6 as appetizers, with each serving containing approximately 278 calories.
